headline: Fashion History
description: Fashion reflects culture, technology, and social change through clothing. Key shifts: ancient draped garments → tailored medieval → Renaissance opulence → Industrial Revolution mass production → 20th century rapid cycles → fast fashion (1990s+) → sustainable fashion (2020s+). Haute couture (Paris, 1858, Worth) set luxury standards.

citation.name: Fashion: The Definitive History of Costume and Style (DK)
